check.name: TypeBodyPadding
check.description:
Checks the padding of the body of type definitions (classes, interfaces, enums, records). That is, whether a blank line is required immediately after the opening brace and/or immediately before the closing brace of type bodies. Empty type bodies are exempt from this check by default.

A blank line (padding) line is a line containing only whitespace characters.

  • Property starting - Require a blank line after the type body opening brace. Type: boolean. Default value: true.
  • Property ending - Require a blank line before the type body closing brace. Type: boolean. Default value: true.
  • Property allowEmpty - Allow empty type bodies (no members) to omit the blank lines. Type: boolean. Default value: true.
  • Property skipInner - Control whether to skip checking of inner types. Type: boolean. Default value: true.
  • Property skipLocal - Control whether to skip checking of local types. Type: boolean. Default value: true.
  • Property tokens - tokens to check Type: java.lang.String[]. Validation type: tokenSet. Default value: CLASS_DEF, INTERFACE_DEF, ENUM_DEF, RECORD_DEF, ANNOTATION_DEF.

Parent is com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.TreeWalker

Violation Message Keys:

  • type.body.padding.after.lcurly
  • type.body.padding.before.rcurly

property.name: allowEmpty
property.description: Allow empty type bodies to omit blank line padding.

property.name: ending
property.description: Require a blank line before the type body closing brace.

property.name: skipInner
property.description: Control whether to skip checking of inner types.

property.name: skipLocal
property.description: Control whether to skip checking of local types.

property.name: starting
property.description: Require a blank line after the type body opening brace.
